blackout_overlap_toggle: Do NOT allow boarding reservations to overlap blackout dates
daycare_kennel_mode_subtitle: Choose whether daycare reservations should count against your kennel inventory.
daycare_kennel_mode_info_title: Open or free-roam daycare does not use kennel inventory. Kennel-based daycare counts each daycare reservation against kennel availability and allows staff to manage kennel assignments later.
daycare_kennel_mode_open_roam_helper: Choose this if daycare dogs do not use assigned kennels and should not reduce kennel availability.
daycare_kennel_mode_kennel_based_helper: Choose this if daycare dogs use kennels and should reduce the same kennel inventory used for boarding.
kennel_validation_alert: Each kennel type needs both a name and a quantity before you save.
after_hours_pickup_times_helper: These are special pick-up windows outside your normal business hours. Later, on the boarding pricing page, you can attach one flat fee to this type of pick-up.
before_hours_pickup_helper: Turn this on only if you let clients pick up before you officially open. The exact windows and any fee are configured below and on your boarding pricing page.
early_dropoff_helper: Turn this on only if you allow check-in before your normal opening time. The exact windows live below, and the charge is attached from the boarding pricing page.
after_hours_dropoff_helper: Turn this on only if you allow check-in after you normally close. The actual fee is attached from the boarding pricing page so your time windows and pricing stay in sync.
boarding_regular_hours_helper: Use the normal boarding drop-off and pick-up sections for regular business-hour times. Use the special sections below only for time windows outside your normal hours.
before_hours_pickup_times_helper: Choose the exact before-hours pick-up windows clients can request. If you leave a day blank, no before-hours pick-up will be offered on that day.
early_dropoff_times_helper: Choose the exact early drop-off windows clients can request. These are before your normal opening time.
after_hours_dropoff_times_helper: Choose the exact after-hours drop-off windows clients can request. These are after your normal closing time.
business_bio_subtitle: A short description clients will see (500 characters max). Plain text only.
business_bio_placeholder: Tell clients what makes your business great…
business_bio_too_long: Bio must be 500 characters or fewer.
business_bio_emoji_blocked: Please remove emojis from your bio.
deposit_required_helper: Turn this on if clients must pay a boarding deposit. The simple amount below is only a fallback. If you build detailed boarding deposit tiers on the boarding pricing page, those detailed rules will be used instead.
deposit_amount_helper: Use this only if you want one simple flat deposit amount. For tiered deposits, percentage deposits, or deposits based on included charge categories, use the detailed boarding pricing page instead.
boarding_pricing_rules_card_title: Detailed Boarding Pricing, Deposit & Odd-Hours Rules
boarding_pricing_rules_card_body: Use the boarding pricing page to define what counts as a boarding night, which pickup times trigger extra charges, how stay-length discounts work, what goes into deposit calculations, and which invoice-library items should be used.
temperament_test_helper_text: When enabled, clients booking daycare will automatically see an option to schedule a temperament assessment.
manage_pay_at_checkout_items_title: Manage Pay At Daycare Checkout Items
manage_pay_at_checkout_items_subtitle: Configure daycare and grooming pricing used for daycare pay-at-booking checkout.
manage_pay_at_boarding_checkout_items_su: Configure boarding nightly pricing, stay-length discounts, deposit rules, and odd-hours charges that feed booking, invoices, and remaining-balance calculations.
pricing_discounts_subtitle: Manage discount rules in a dedicated screen so your pricing logic stays modular as boarding and invoicing tools expand.
memberships_subtitle: Build daycare packs, boarding night packages, and monthly passes in a dedicated module so balances stay tied to client profiles.
stripe_fully_active: Stripe is fully active and ready for online payments.
stripe_not_fully_active: Stripe is not fully active yet.
stripe_required_for_payments: Stripe onboarding must be complete before online payments can be enabled.
payments_require_active_stripe_alert: Stripe must be fully active before online payments can be turned on.
payments_optional_helper: Online payments are optional. You can keep software features on without enabling payment processing. Please be aware that, if you have added on the Employment, Human Resources & Financial Management Add-On package, it is strongly recommended that you use payment processing for the most accurate results.
payment_method_requires_active_stripe_al: Stripe must be fully active before this payment option can be enabled.
daycare_pay_at_booking_helper: Clients pay daycare charges immediately when they submit their booking.
boarding_pay_at_booking_helper: Use this when you want the system to estimate the full boarding total, collect the deposit you configured, and leave the remaining balance for later collection or invoicing.
invoice_after_attendance_helper: Use your invoice library to bill clients after the stay or attendance period is complete.
invoice_library_subtitle: Manage reusable invoice items used for post-attendance billing.
pay_at_pickup_helper: Use this when staff collect payment later in person or outside of the booking flow.
service_payment_method_warning: At least one payment method should be enabled for this service if online payments are on.
payments_save_requires_active_stripe_ale: Stripe is not fully active. Payments cannot be saved.
save_failed_alert: Unable to save your settings right now. Please try again.
